autonomous_gates.evidence: task family coding; assumptions allowed when non-destructive
autonomous_gates.next_action: If the prompt is incomplete, choose safe defaults and write assumptions into evidence.
autonomous_gates.purpose: Turn incomplete client prompts into assumed safe defaults instead of stopping the coding lane.
autonomous_gates.title: Scope Defaulting Gate

autonomous_gates.next_action: Route build/app/media requests through aureon_capability_forge before declaring blocked.
autonomous_gates.purpose: Build app/tool/media/UI artifacts locally when AgentCore-style tools are unavailable.
autonomous_gates.title: Local Capability Forge Gate

autonomous_gates.next_action: Create proposals and apply only scoped repo patches through safe local routes.
autonomous_gates.purpose: Apply repo code only through scoped local proposal/apply routes and keep diff evidence.
autonomous_gates.title: Safe Code Authoring Gate

autonomous_gates.next_action: When a skill is missing, create a domain worker, run tests, and publish a quality report.
autonomous_gates.purpose: When a domain worker is missing, research the pattern and create a new local worker with tests.
autonomous_gates.title: Adaptive Skill Acquisition Gate

autonomous_gates.next_action: Use project-local venv/npm only; record installs and rerun verification.
autonomous_gates.purpose: Install or validate dependencies inside the repo environment only, then test the result.
autonomous_gates.title: Project Dependency Gate

autonomous_gates.evidence: GitHub/open-source routes are read-only reference routes
autonomous_gates.next_action: Search sources, capture source packets, review license/security, then build Aureon's own implementation.
autonomous_gates.purpose: Search GitHub, docs, and package sources as read-only reference material before implementing Aureon's own code.
autonomous_gates.title: Open Source Research Gate

autonomous_gates.next_action: Run focused tests/build/smoke after each generated artifact or repo patch.
autonomous_gates.purpose: Run focused pytest, frontend builds, Playwright smoke checks, and generated artifact probes.
autonomous_gates.title: Test And Run Gate

autonomous_gates.next_action: Run complex stress certification and hold handover until fake passes are zero.
autonomous_gates.purpose: Hide or hold weak outputs until quality reports, previews, tests, and snags pass.
autonomous_gates.title: No Half-Baked Handover Gate

autonomous_gates.next_action: Never convert trading, payment, filing, credential, or destructive OS authority into coding autonomy.
autonomous_gates.purpose: Keep live trading, payments, official filing, credential reveal, and destructive OS actions out of coding autonomy.
autonomous_gates.title: Manual Authority Boundary Gate

autonomous_work_orders.acceptance: Aureon produces a source-linked implementation, local tests/build/browser proof, quality report, and zero fake passes.

detected_blockers.source_text: Create a local operator report generator that explains a complex build result with summary, proof, snags, and next action.

principle: Missing coding skills, tools, dependencies, and proof become autonomous gates; unsafe authority remains manual.

runtime_contract.on_agentcore_missing: reroute to local capability forge and safe code authoring gate
runtime_contract.on_dependency_missing: install only into repo-local venv/node_modules where safe, then rerun validation
runtime_contract.on_external_code_found: analyze patterns and license; do not paste large/raw third-party code into Aureon without review
runtime_contract.on_manual_boundary: hold and explain the human-only gate
runtime_contract.on_missing_skill: search local repo, build source packet, read GitHub/open-source references, implement a local worker, test, then publish quality evidence
